message:
feat(wal): add WAL FEC repair metrics and tracing span wal_raptorq (bd-3bw.2)

Add WalFecRepairCounters with AtomicU64 counters: repairs_total,
repairs_succeeded, repairs_failed, repair_duration_us_total, encode_ops.
Add tracing span 'wal_raptorq' with segment_id, corruption_detected,
symbols_used_for_repair, repair_success, repair_duration_us to
recover_wal_fec_group_with_config(). Wire encode metric into
generate_wal_fec_repair_symbols(). 6 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
